verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ الٓر ۚ كِتَٰبٌ أَنزَلْنَٰهُ إِلَيْكَ لِتُخْرِجَ ٱلنَّاسَ مِنَ ٱلظُّلُمَٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِ بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِمْ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَمِيدِ
verses.text: Alif Lām Rā’. A Book – We have sent it down to you, so that you may bring the people out of the darkness to the light, by the permission of their Lord, to the path of the Mighty, the Praiseworthy.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۗ وَوَيْلٌۭ لِّلْكَٰفِرِينَ مِنْ عَذَابٍۢ شَدِيدٍ
verses.text: God who – to Him (belongs) whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Woe to the disbelievers because of a harsh punishment!

canonical_variants.arabic: اِ۬للَّهُ اُ۬لذِے لَهُۥ مَا فِے اِ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِے اِ۬لْأَرْضِۖ وَوَيْلٞ لِّلْكَٰفِرِينَ مِنْ عَذَابٖ شَدِيدٍۖ
اِ۬للَّهُ اُ۬لذِے لَهُۥ مَا فِے اِ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِے اِ۬لَارْضِۖ وَوَيْلٞ لِّلْكٰ۪فِرِينَ مِنْ عَذَابٖ شَدِيدٍۖ

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَسْتَحِبُّونَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا عَلَى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ وَيَصُدُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ وَيَبْغُونَهَا عِوَجًا ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ فِى ضَلَٰلٍۭ بَعِيدٍۢ
verses.text: Those who love this present life more than the Hereafter, and keep (people) from the way of God, and desire (to make) it crooked – those are far astray!

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا بِلِسَانِ قَوْمِهِۦ لِيُبَيِّنَ لَهُمْ ۖ فَيُضِلُّ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَهْدِى مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: We have not sent any messenger except in the language of his people, so that he might make (things) clear to them. Then God leads astray whomever He pleases and guides whomever He pleases. He is the Mighty, the Wise.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَآ أَنْ أَخْرِجْ قَوْمَكَ مِنَ ٱلظُّلُمَٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِ وَذَكِّرْهُم بِأَيَّىٰمِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَٰتٍۢ لِّكُلِّ صَبَّارٍۢ شَكُورٍۢ
verses.text: Certainly We sent Moses with Our signs: ‘Bring your people out of the darkness to the light, and remind them of the days of God.’ Surely in that are signs indeed for every patient (and) thankful one.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِقَوْمِهِ ٱذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَةَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْكُمْ إِذْ أَنجَىٰكُم مِّنْ ءَالِ فِرْعَوْنَ يَسُومُونَكُمْ سُوٓءَ ٱلْعَذَابِ وَيُذَبِّحُونَ أَبْنَآءَكُمْ وَيَسْتَحْيُونَ نِسَآءَكُمْ ۚ وَفِى ذَٰلِكُم بَلَآءٌۭ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ عَظِيمٌۭ
verses.text: (Remember) when Moses said to his people, ‘Remember the blessing of God on you, when He rescued you from the house of Pharaoh. They were inflicting on you the evil punishment, and slaughtering your sons and sparing your women. In that was a great test from your Lord.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ تَأَذَّنَ رَبُّكُمْ لَئِن شَكَرْتُمْ لَأَزِيدَنَّكُمْ ۖ وَلَئِن كَفَرْتُمْ إِنَّ عَذَابِى لَشَدِيدٌۭ
verses.text: And (remember) when your Lord proclaimed, ‘If indeed you are thankful, I shall indeed give you more, but if indeed you are ungrateful, surely My punishment is harsh indeed.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالَ مُوسَىٰٓ إِن تَكْفُرُوٓا۟ أَنتُمْ وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ جَمِيعًۭا فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَغَنِىٌّ حَمِيدٌ
verses.text: And Moses said, ‘(Even) if you disbelieve, you and whoever is on the earth all together – surely God is indeed wealthy, praiseworthy.’

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَمْ يَأْتِكُمْ نَبَؤُا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ قَوْمِ نُوحٍۢ وَعَادٍۢ وَثَمُودَ ۛ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ ۛ لَا يَعْلَمُهُمْ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ ۚ جَآءَتْهُمْ رُسُلُهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنَٰتِ فَرَدُّوٓا۟ أَيْدِيَهُمْ فِىٓ أَفْوَٰهِهِمْ وَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كَفَرْنَا بِمَآ أُرْسِلْتُم بِهِۦ وَإِنَّا لَفِى شَكٍّۢ مِّمَّا تَدْعُونَنَآ إِلَيْهِ مُرِيبٍۢ
verses.text: Has no story come to you of those who were before you: the people of Noah, ‘Ād, Thamūd, and those who (came) after them? No one knows them but God. Their messengers brought them the clear signs, but they put their hands in their mouths, and said, ‘Surely We disbelieve in what you are sent with, and surely we are in grave doubt indeed about what you call us to.’

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ قَالَتْ رُسُلُهُمْ أَفِى ٱللَّهِ شَكٌّۭ فَاطِرِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ يَدْعُوكُمْ لِيَغْفِرَ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمْ وَيُؤَخِّرَكُمْ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍۢ مُّسَمًّۭى ۚ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا بَشَرٌۭ مِّثْلُنَا تُرِيدُونَ أَن تَصُدُّونَا عَمَّا كَانَ يَعْبُدُ ءَابَآؤُنَا فَأْتُونَا بِسُلْطَٰنٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
verses.text: Their messengers said, ‘(Is there any) doubt about God, Creator of the heavens and the earth? He calls you so that He may forgive you of your sins and spare you for an appointed time.’ They said, ‘You are nothing but human beings like us. You want to keep us from what our fathers have served. Bring us some clear authority (for this).’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَتْ لَهُمْ رُسُلُهُمْ إِن نَّحْنُ إِلَّا بَشَرٌۭ مِّثْلُكُمْ وَلَٰكِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَمُنُّ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنْ عِبَادِهِۦ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ لَنَآ أَن نَّأْتِيَكُم بِسُلْطَٰنٍ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Their messengers said to them, ‘We are nothing but human beings like you, but God bestows favor on whomever He pleases of His servants. It is not for us to bring you any authority, except by the permission of God. In God let the believers put their trust.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا لَنَآ أَلَّا نَتَوَكَّلَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ وَقَدْ هَدَىٰنَا سُبُلَنَا ۚ وَلَنَصْبِرَنَّ عَلَىٰ مَآ ءَاذَيْتُمُونَا ۚ وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ ٱلْمُتَوَكِّلُونَ
verses.text: Why should we not put our trust in God, when He has guided us to our ways. Indeed we shall patiently endure whatever harm you do us. In God let the trusting put their trust.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِرُسُلِهِمْ لَنُخْرِجَنَّكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِنَآ أَوْ لَتَعُودُنَّ فِى مِلَّتِنَا ۖ فَأَوْحَىٰٓ إِلَيْهِمْ رَبُّهُمْ لَنُهْلِكَنَّ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: Those who had disbelieved said to their messengers, ‘We shall indeed expel you from our land, or (else) you will return to our creed.’ Then their Lord inspired them: ‘We shall indeed destroy the evildoers

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَنُسْكِنَنَّكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ لِمَنْ خَافَ مَقَامِى وَخَافَ وَعِيدِ
verses.text: and cause you to inhabit the land after them. That is for whoever fears My position and fears My promise.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱسْتَفْتَحُوا۟ وَخَابَ كُلُّ جَبَّارٍ عَنِيدٍۢ
verses.text: They asked for victory, and every stubborn tyrant despaired.

verses.quran_arabic: مِّن وَرَآئِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ وَيُسْقَىٰ مِن مَّآءٍۢ صَدِيدٍۢ
verses.text: Behind him is Gehenna, and he is given a drink of filthy water.

verses.quran_arabic: يَتَجَرَّعُهُۥ وَلَا يَكَادُ يُسِيغُهُۥ وَيَأْتِيهِ ٱلْمَوْتُ مِن كُلِّ مَكَانٍۢ وَمَا هُوَ بِمَيِّتٍۢ ۖ وَمِن وَرَآئِهِۦ عَذَابٌ غَلِيظٌۭ
verses.text: He gulps it but can hardly swallow it. Death comes upon him from every side, yet he does not die, and behind him is a stern punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: مَّثَلُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِرَبِّهِمْ ۖ أَعْمَٰلُهُمْ كَرَمَادٍ ٱشْتَدَّتْ بِهِ ٱلرِّيحُ فِى يَوْمٍ عَاصِفٍۢ ۖ لَّا يَقْدِرُونَ مِمَّا كَسَبُوا۟ عَلَىٰ شَىْءٍۢ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلضَّلَٰلُ ٱلْبَعِيدُ
verses.text: A parable of those who disbelieve in their Lord: their deeds are like ashes, on which the wind blows strongly on a stormy day. They have no power over anything of what they have earned. That is straying far.

canonical_variants.arabic: مَّثَلُ اُ۬لذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِرَبِّهِمْۖ أَعْمَٰلُهُمْ كَرَمَادٍ اِ۪شْتَدَّتْ بِهِ اِ۬لرِّيَٰحُ فِے يَوْمٍ عَاصِفٖ لَّا يَقْدِرُونَ مِمَّا كَسَبُواْ عَلَىٰ شَےْءٖۖ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ اَ۬لضَّلَٰلُ اُ۬لْبَعِيدُۖ

مَّثَلُ اُ۬لذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِرَبِّهِمُۥٓۖ أَعْمَٰلُهُمْ كَرَمَادٍ اِ۪شْتَدَّتْ بِهِ اِ۬لرِّيَٰحُ فِے يَوْمٍ عَاصِفٖ لَّا يَقْدِرُونَ مِمَّا كَسَبُواْ عَلَىٰ شَےْءٖۖ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ اَ۬لضَّلَٰلُ اُ۬لْبَعِيدُۖ

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۚ إِن يَشَأْ يُذْهِبْكُمْ وَيَأْتِ بِخَلْقٍۢ جَدِيدٍۢ
verses.text: Do you not see that God created the heavens and the earth in truth? If He (so) pleases, He will do away with you and bring a new creation.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا ذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ بِعَزِيزٍۢ
verses.text: That is no great matter for God.

verses.quran_arabic: وَبَرَزُوا۟ لِلَّهِ جَمِيعًۭا فَقَالَ ٱلضُّعَفَٰٓؤُا۟ لِلَّذِينَ ٱسْتَكْبَرُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا لَكُمْ تَبَعًۭا فَهَلْ أَنتُم مُّغْنُونَ عَنَّا مِنْ عَذَابِ ٱللَّهِ مِن شَىْءٍۢ ۚ قَالُوا۟ لَوْ هَدَىٰنَا ٱللَّهُ لَهَدَيْنَٰكُمْ ۖ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْنَآ أَجَزِعْنَآ أَمْ صَبَرْنَا مَا لَنَا مِن مَّحِيصٍۢ
verses.text: They will come forth to God all together, and the weak will say to those who were arrogant, ‘Surely we were your followers, so are you going relieve us (now) of any of the punishment of God?’ They will say, ‘If God had guided us, we would indeed have guided you. (It is) the same for us whether we become distressed or are patient. (There is) no place of escape for us.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالَ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنُ لَمَّا قُضِىَ ٱلْأَمْرُ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ وَعَدَكُمْ وَعْدَ ٱلْحَقِّ وَوَعَدتُّكُمْ فَأَخْلَفْتُكُمْ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ لِىَ عَلَيْكُم مِّن سُلْطَٰنٍ إِلَّآ أَن دَعَوْتُكُمْ فَٱسْتَجَبْتُمْ لِى ۖ فَلَا تَلُومُونِى وَلُومُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُم ۖ مَّآ أَنَا۠ بِمُصْرِخِكُمْ وَمَآ أَنتُم بِمُصْرِخِىَّ ۖ إِنِّى كَفَرْتُ بِمَآ أَشْرَكْتُمُونِ مِن قَبْلُ ۗ إِنَّ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ لَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: And Satan will say, when the matter is decided, ‘Surely God promised you a true promise, and I (too) promised you, (but) then I broke (my promise) to you. I had no authority over you, except that I called you and you responded to me. So do not blame me, but blame yourselves. I am not going to help you, nor are you going to help me. Surely I disbelieved in your associating me (with God) before.’ Surely the evildoers – for them (there is) a painful punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأُدْخِلَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ جَنَّٰتٍۢ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِمْ ۖ تَحِيَّتُهُمْ فِيهَا سَلَٰمٌ
verses.text: But those who believe and do righteous deeds – they are made to enter Gardens through which rivers flow, there to remain by the permission of their Lord. Their greeting there is: ‘Peace!’

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ ضَرَبَ ٱللَّهُ مَثَلًۭا كَلِمَةًۭ طَيِّبَةًۭ كَشَجَرَةٍۢ طَيِّبَةٍ أَصْلُهَا ثَابِتٌۭ وَفَرْعُهَا فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ
verses.text: Do you not see how God has struck a parable? A good word is like a good tree. Its root is firm and its branch (reaches) to the sky,

verses.quran_arabic: تُؤْتِىٓ أُكُلَهَا كُلَّ حِينٍۭ بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهَا ۗ وَيَضْرِبُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْأَمْثَالَ لِلنَّاسِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: giving its fruit every season by the permission of its Lord. God strikes parables for the people so that they may take heed.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَثَلُ كَلِمَةٍ خَبِيثَةٍۢ كَشَجَرَةٍ خَبِيثَةٍ ٱجْتُثَّتْ مِن فَوْقِ ٱلْأَرْضِ مَا لَهَا مِن قَرَارٍۢ
verses.text: But the parable of a bad word is like a bad tree, uprooted from the earth, without any support for it.

verses.quran_arabic: يُثَبِّتُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِٱلْقَوْلِ ٱلثَّابِتِ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَفِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ ۖ وَيُضِلُّ ٱللَّهُ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ ۚ وَيَفْعَلُ ٱللَّهُ مَا يَشَآءُ
verses.text: God makes firm those who believe by the firm word in this present life and in the Hereafter. But God leads astray the evildoers. God does whatever He pleases.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ بَدَّلُوا۟ نِعْمَتَ ٱللَّهِ كُفْرًۭا وَأَحَلُّوا۟ قَوْمَهُمْ دَارَ ٱلْبَوَارِ
verses.text: Do you not see those who have exchanged the blessing of God for disbelief, and caused their people to descend to the home of ruin –

verses.quran_arabic: جَهَنَّمَ يَصْلَوْنَهَا ۖ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْقَرَارُ
verses.text: Gehenna – where they will burn? It is an evil dwelling place!

verses.quran_arabic: وَجَعَلُوا۟ لِلَّهِ أَندَادًۭا لِّيُضِلُّوا۟ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ ۗ قُلْ تَمَتَّعُوا۟ فَإِنَّ مَصِيرَكُمْ إِلَى ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: They have set up rivals to God in order to lead (people) astray from His way. Say: ‘Enjoy (yourselves)! Surely your destination is to the Fire!’

canonical_variants.arabic: وَجَعَلُواْ لِلَّهِ أَندَادٗا لِّيَضِلُّواْ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۗ قُلۡ تَمَتَّعُواْ فَإِنَّ مَصِيرَكُمۡ إِلَى اَ۬لنّ۪ارِ
canonical_variants.english: And they set up rivals to Allah in order to stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yourselves, for surely your destiny is to the Fire.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَجَعَلُواْ لِلَّهِ أَندَادٗا لِّيَضِلُّواْ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۗ قُلۡ  تَمَتَّعُواْ فَإِنَّ مَصِيرَكُمۡ إِلَى اَ۬لنّ۪ارِ
canonical_variants.english: And they set up rivals to Allah in order to stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yourselves, for surely your destiny is to the Fire.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَجَعَلُواْ لِلَّهِ أَندَادٗا لِّيَضِلُّواْ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۗ قُلۡ تَمَتَّعُواْ فَإِنَّ مَصِيرَكُمُۥ إِلَى ٱلنَّارِ
canonical_variants.english: And they set up rivals to Allah in order to stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yourselves, for surely your destiny is to the Fire.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَجَعَلُواْ لِلَّهِ أَندَادٗا لِّيَضِلُّواْ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۗ قُلۡ تَمَتَّعُواْ فَإِنَّ مَصِيرَكُمُۥ إِلَى ٱلنَّارِ
canonical_variants.english: And they set up rivals to Allah in order to stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yourselves, for surely your destiny is to the Fire.”

verses.quran_arabic: قُل لِّعِبَادِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ يُقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُنفِقُوا۟ مِمَّا رَزَقْنَٰهُمْ سِرًّۭا وَعَلَانِيَةًۭ مِّن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِىَ يَوْمٌۭ لَّا بَيْعٌۭ فِيهِ وَلَا خِلَٰلٌ
verses.text: Say to My servants who believe (that) they should observe the prayer, and contribute from what We have provided them, in secret and in open, before a Day comes when (there will be) no bargaining and no friendship.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۭ فَأَخْرَجَ بِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلثَّمَرَٰتِ رِزْقًۭا لَّكُمْ ۖ وَسَخَّرَ لَكُمُ ٱلْفُلْكَ لِتَجْرِىَ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ بِأَمْرِهِۦ ۖ وَسَخَّرَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَنْهَٰرَ
verses.text: (It is) God who created the heavens and the earth, and sent down water from the sky, and brought forth fruits by means of it as a provision for you. And He subjected the ship to you, to run on the sea by His command, and subjected the rivers to you.

verses.quran_arabic: وَسَخَّرَ لَكُمُ ٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ دَآئِبَيْنِ ۖ وَسَخَّرَ لَكُمُ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ
verses.text: And He subjected the sun and the moon to you, both being constant (in their courses), and subjected the night and the day to you.

verses.quran_arabic: وَءَاتَىٰكُم مِّن كُلِّ مَا سَأَلْتُمُوهُ ۚ وَإِن تَعُدُّوا۟ نِعْمَتَ ٱللَّهِ لَا تُحْصُوهَآ ۗ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ لَظَلُومٌۭ كَفَّارٌۭ
verses.text: He has given you some of all that you have asked Him for. If you (try to) number God’s blessing, you will not (be able to) count it. Surely the human is indeed an evildoer (and) ungrateful!

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ إِبْرَٰهِيمُ رَبِّ ٱجْعَلْ هَٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدَ ءَامِنًۭا وَٱجْنُبْنِى وَبَنِىَّ أَن نَّعْبُدَ ٱلْأَصْنَامَ
verses.text: (Remember) when Abraham said, ‘My Lord, make this land secure, and keep me and my sons away from serving the idols.

verses.quran_arabic: رَبِّ إِنَّهُنَّ أَضْلَلْنَ كَثِيرًۭا مِّنَ ٱلنَّاسِ ۖ فَمَن تَبِعَنِى فَإِنَّهُۥ مِنِّى ۖ وَمَنْ عَصَانِى فَإِنَّكَ غَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ
verses.text: My Lord, surely they have led many of the people astray. Whoever follows me, surely he belongs to me, and whoever disobeys me – surely You are forgiving, compassionate.

verses.quran_arabic: رَّبَّنَآ إِنِّىٓ أَسْكَنتُ مِن ذُرِّيَّتِى بِوَادٍ غَيْرِ ذِى زَرْعٍ عِندَ بَيْتِكَ ٱلْمُحَرَّمِ رَبَّنَا لِيُقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ فَٱجْعَلْ أَفْـِٔدَةًۭ مِّنَ ٱلنَّاسِ تَهْوِىٓ إِلَيْهِمْ وَٱرْزُقْهُم مِّنَ ٱلثَّمَرَٰتِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: Our Lord, I have settled some of my descendants in a wādī without any cultivation, near your Sacred House, Our Lord, in order that they may observe the prayer. So cause the hearts of some of the people to yearn toward them, and provide them with fruits, so that they may be thankful.

verses.quran_arabic: رَبَّنَآ إِنَّكَ تَعْلَمُ مَا نُخْفِى وَمَا نُعْلِنُ ۗ وَمَا يَخْفَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ مِن شَىْءٍۢ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ
verses.text: Our Lord, You know what we hide and what we speak aloud. Nothing is hidden from God (either) on the earth or in the sky.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى وَهَبَ لِى عَلَى ٱلْكِبَرِ إِسْمَٰعِيلَ وَإِسْحَٰقَ ۚ إِنَّ رَبِّى لَسَمِيعُ ٱلدُّعَآءِ
verses.text: Praise (be) to God, who has granted me Ishmael and Isaac in (my) old age. Surely my Lord is indeed the Hearer of the call.

verses.quran_arabic: رَبِّ ٱجْعَلْنِى مُقِيمَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِى ۚ رَبَّنَا وَتَقَبَّلْ دُعَآءِ
verses.text: My Lord, make me observant of the prayer, and (also) some of my descendants, our Lord, and accept my call.

verses.quran_arabic: رَبَّنَا ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَلِوَٰلِدَىَّ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلْحِسَابُ
verses.text: Our Lord, forgive me, and my parents, and the believers, on the Day when the reckoning takes place.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَا تَحْسَبَنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَٰفِلًا عَمَّا يَعْمَلُ ٱلظَّٰلِمُونَ ۚ إِنَّمَا يُؤَخِّرُهُمْ لِيَوْمٍۢ تَشْخَصُ فِيهِ ٱلْأَبْصَٰرُ
verses.text: Do not think (that) God is oblivious of what the evildoers do. He is only sparing them for a Day when (their) eyes will stare,

verses.quran_arabic: مُهْطِعِينَ مُقْنِعِى رُءُوسِهِمْ لَا يَرْتَدُّ إِلَيْهِمْ طَرْفُهُمْ ۖ وَأَفْـِٔدَتُهُمْ هَوَآءٌۭ
verses.text: (as they go) rushing with their heads raised up, unable to turn back their gaze, and their hearts empty.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَنذِرِ ٱلنَّاسَ يَوْمَ يَأْتِيهِمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ فَيَقُولُ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ رَبَّنَآ أَخِّرْنَآ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍۢ قَرِيبٍۢ نُّجِبْ دَعْوَتَكَ وَنَتَّبِعِ ٱلرُّسُلَ ۗ أَوَلَمْ تَكُونُوٓا۟ أَقْسَمْتُم مِّن قَبْلُ مَا لَكُم مِّن زَوَالٍۢ
verses.text: Warn the people (of) a Day when the punishment will come to them, and those who have done evil will say, ‘Our Lord, spare us for a time near (at hand)! We shall respond to Your call and follow the messengers.’ ‘Did you not swear before that (there would be) no end for you?

verses.quran_arabic: وَسَكَنتُمْ فِى مَسَٰكِنِ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ وَتَبَيَّنَ لَكُمْ كَيْفَ فَعَلْنَا بِهِمْ وَضَرَبْنَا لَكُمُ ٱلْأَمْثَالَ
verses.text: You dwell in the (same) dwelling places as those who did themselves evil, and it became clear to you how We dealt with them, and (how) We struck parables for you.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَدْ مَكَرُوا۟ مَكْرَهُمْ وَعِندَ ٱللَّهِ مَكْرُهُمْ وَإِن كَانَ مَكْرُهُمْ لِتَزُولَ مِنْهُ ٱلْجِبَالُ
verses.text: They schemed their scheme, but their scheme was known to God, even though their scheme was (such as) to remove the mountains by it.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَا تَحْسَبَنَّ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِفَ وَعْدِهِۦ رُسُلَهُۥٓ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَزِيزٌۭ ذُو ٱنتِقَامٍۢ
verses.text: Do not think (that) God is going to break His promise to His messengers. Surely God is mighty, a taker of vengeance.

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ تُبَدَّلُ ٱلْأَرْضُ غَيْرَ ٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ ۖ وَبَرَزُوا۟ لِلَّهِ ٱلْوَٰحِدِ ٱلْقَهَّارِ
verses.text: On the Day when the earth will be changed (into something) other (than) the earth, and the heavens (as well), and they will go forth to God, the One, the Supreme,

verses.quran_arabic: وَتَرَى ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ مُّقَرَّنِينَ فِى ٱلْأَصْفَادِ
verses.text: and you will see the sinners on that Day bound together in chains,

verses.quran_arabic: سَرَابِيلُهُم مِّن قَطِرَانٍۢ وَتَغْشَىٰ وُجُوهَهُمُ ٱلنَّارُ
verses.text: their clothing (made) of pitch, and the Fire will cover their faces,

verses.quran_arabic: لِيَجْزِىَ ٱللَّهُ كُلَّ نَفْسٍۢ مَّا كَسَبَتْ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَرِيعُ ٱلْحِسَابِ
verses.text: so that God may repay everyone for what he has earned. Surely God is quick at the reckoning.

verses.quran_arabic: هَٰذَا بَلَٰغٌۭ لِّلنَّاسِ وَلِيُنذَرُوا۟ بِهِۦ وَلِيَعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّمَا هُوَ إِلَٰهٌۭ وَٰحِدٌۭ وَلِيَذَّكَّرَ أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْأَلْبَٰبِ
verses.text: This is a delivery for the people, and (it is delivered) so that they may be warned by means of it, and that they may know that He is one God, and that those with understanding may take heed.
